document_info.prepared_by: Sandra Villareal, Vice President, Texas Commercial Insurance Partners
document_info.recipient: Underwriting Department, Apex Managing General Agency

business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.notes: Property coverage on a blanket basis with agreed value endorsement. Wind/hail deductible applies per schedule.

positives: Background checks and MVR reviews are conducted annually for all employees in safety-sensitive positions.
The insured maintains a formal business continuity and disaster recovery plan tested annually.
The insured carries contractual risk transfer provisions in all subcontractor and vendor agreements.
All facilities maintain current fire suppression and sprinkler systems inspected annually by certified contractors.
All locations are equipped with security camera systems and 24/7 monitoring services.
24 years of continuous operations under consistent management demonstrates operational stability.
With 145 employees and a structured HR program, the insured maintains low turnover and consistent safety training.
concerns: Loss experience reflects a mixed trend with some large individual claims in the review period.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Over the review period, the insured has incurred 3 total claims with $259,081.54 in total paid losses and $303,232.60 total incurred. Currently, 1 claim remains open and 2 have been closed. Annualized loss ratio is 25.0% (avg annual incurred $101,077.53 against current annual premium $403,697.14 over 3 loss years).

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: We are pleased to submit Lone Star Property Holdings, LP for your review and consideration. The insured is a commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas, headquartered in Dallas, with approximately 24 years of operating history. Coverage is requested for Commercial Property.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas, headquartered in Dallas.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Background checks and MVR reviews are conducted annually for all employees in safety-sensitive positions. The insured maintains a formal business continuity and disaster recovery plan tested annually. The insured carries contractual risk transfer provisions in all subcontractor and vendor agreements. All facilities maintain current fire suppression and sprinkler systems inspected annually by certified contractors. All locations are equipped with security camera systems and 24/7 monitoring services. With 145 employees and a structured HR program, the insured maintains low turnover and consistent safety training.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: The loss experience reflects a mixed trend with some large individual claims in the review period. Over the review period, the insured has incurred 3 total claims with $259,081.54 in total paid losses and $303,232.60 total incurred. Currently, 1 claim remains open and 2 have been closed. Annualized loss ratio is 25.0% (avg annual incurred $101,077.53 against current annual premium $403,697.14 over 3 loss years).
